current_tasks: Latest commits: 8420833a `refactor(app-me): advertise citizen web renderer`; ee6ab311 `refactor(app-dev): centralize studio renderer catalog`; 81c8f36f `feat(app-dev): add headless renderer snapshot`; d82eb6c8 `chore(project): checkpoint host renderer contract`; b61b5f64 `refactor(app-dev): advertise studio web renderer`; 5cc860cd `feat(homestead): define host renderer contract`.

81c8f36f added `apps/dev/src/lib/studio-headless-runtime.ts` and tests. It exports `STUDIO_HEADLESS_RENDERER` and `createStudioHeadlessSnapshot(...)`, deriving headless diagnostics/surface rejections/actions from semantic Homestead telemetry without DOM. This proves automation/headless can consume the same renderer vocabulary.

ee6ab311 added `apps/dev/src/lib/studio-renderers.ts` and tests, centralizing product-owned app/dev renderers: `STUDIO_WEB_RENDERER`, `STUDIO_HEADLESS_RENDERER`, `STUDIO_RENDERERS`, `findStudioRenderer(...)`, `resolveStudioRenderer(...)`. `studio-dashboard-runtime.ts` now aliases `STUDIO_DASHBOARD_RENDERER` from the catalog; `studio-headless-runtime.ts` imports headless descriptor from it.

8420833a added `apps/me/src/lib/me-renderers.ts` and tests so `apps/me` advertises `REFARM_ME_WEB_RENDERER` through the same Homestead host-renderer contract. `docs/REFARM_HOST_MODEL.md` now records apps/me validating Web renderer descriptors outside the workbench.

Validations passed after these slices: `npm --prefix apps/dev test -- studio-headless-runtime.test.ts`; `npm --prefix apps/dev test -- studio-renderers.test.ts studio-headless-runtime.test.ts studio-dashboard-runtime.test.ts`; `npm --prefix apps/dev run type-check`; `npm --prefix apps/me test -- me-renderers.test.ts`; `npm --prefix apps/me run type-check`; `npm run project:validate --silent`; `git diff --check`.
